title: OAuth flow - register redirect URI with Red Hat SSO
description: chrome.identity.launchWebAuthFlow needs the extension redirect URI registered in the ocm-cli client (or dedicated acp-browser-extension client) in the redhat-external realm at sso.redhat.com. Until this is done, users must paste tokens manually. The redirect URI is chrome.identity.getRedirectURL() — stable per extension install.

title: Fix chat streaming - messages don't stream in real-time
description: When sending a message in chat, the assistant response doesn't stream. SSE connection may not be connecting properly or message format mismatch. Debug: verify POST /messages succeeds, SSE /messages?after_seq=N connects, events parse correctly.

title: Session list - show last message preview (truncated)
description: Show the last message or prompt as a truncated single line under each session in the list, similar to Slack message preview. Currently shows prompt field but should show most recent message from the chat history.

title: Help chatbot - per-project help agent with optimistic UI
description: Skeleton scaffolded in extension (help panel, buffered input, SSE streaming). Still needs: server-side help agent auto-creation per project, opt-out in workspace settings, pre-configured system prompt with ACP docs.

title: Server version display in header
description: Header shows server:unknown because no version endpoint exists. Either add GET /api/ambient/v1/version to the API server, or parse version from response headers if available.

title: Native messaging host for auto-token
description: Small Python script registered as Chrome native messaging host. Reads token from ~/Library/Application Support/ambient/config.json automatically. Eliminates manual token paste. One-time install via setup script. Alternative to OAuth flow for local dev.
